title: System Engineer
description:
JOB TITLE: System Engineer


Responsibilities:

  • Monitor and manage all installed systems, servers, and applications across on-premise and cloud environments.
  • Set up and maintain servers, virtual machines (VMs), storage systems, and Linux environments.
  • Perform user support tasks including onboarding and offboarding processes.
  • Backup and restore servers, VMs, and email systems regularly.
  • Set up and provide IT support for events and roadshows, including after-office hours if required.
  • Maintain, review, and enhance network and cybersecurity policies (e.g., firewall, proxy, MAC whitelisting).
  • Set up and maintain CCTV systems.
  • Troubleshoot and manage IT incidents, including problem management and resolution.
  • Review and assess IT-related risks, especially for network infrastructure and user access.
  • Provide timely IT support to ensure smooth business operations and continuity.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in IT-related field. Candidates with ITE certification and relevant experience may also be considered.
  • Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience supporting systems including Windows Servers, firewalls, network switches, backup systems, and databases.
  • Experience in setting up and administering Cloud platforms (e.g., Microsoft Azure), Microsoft Dynamics CRM, and NAVISION is an added advantage.
  • Proficient in Windows Server administration (AD, DNS, DHCP, IIS, Exchange, Office365, Hyper-V), and WAN/LAN/WLAN solutions.
  • Hands-on experience with Microsoft 365 and general network infrastructure is advantageous.
  • Certifications such as MCSE and/or CCNA, and experience with Hyper-V/VM deployment are preferred.
  • Detail-oriented with strong documentation skills.
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills; independent and able to handle multiple tasks effectively.

Benefits:

· Annual, childcare, maternity/paternity, medical and dental benefits

· Career progression

· Annual wage increment

· Transport claims

· Professional and training development

· Staff’s Health & Safety Insurance

· Staff Purchase Discount

· Flexi-work arrangements

· Variable bonus (for sales staff) and year-end performance bonus


Working Location:

• Gain City Ang Mo Kio


Note:

• Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
GAIN CITY BEST-ELECTRIC PTE LTD

Looking for a challenging and rewarding career in a fast paced organization? Join Gain City!


Established in 1981, Gain City is one of Singapore‘s leading retail brand carrying a wide range of quality air-conditioners, home appliances, audio visual equipment, digital and IT products. It is a multi-faceted organisation with distinctive track records in retail and wholesales operations, manufacturing, maintenance and repair, commercial, industrial and residential projects, import and export.
 

Gain City the leading home-grown appliances and electronic retail store is also proud to be the recipient of the prestigious Enterprise 50 Award (5 times), Singapore Prestige Brand Award 2011 (Winner, SPBA-Heritage Brand). Gain City has also previously awarded other celebrated award such as the ISO 9001-2000 Certification, Super Brand (2004,2005,2006,2008 & 2009) and Singapore Promising Brand Award (2006).
